category_sources: source_facts.description says it updates multiple git repositories; official GitHub README describes updating multiple git repositories.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gitup; official GitHub README title says gitup (the git-repo-updater).
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary usage documentation found.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository; official GitHub page is earwig/git-repo-updater.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify a Git CLI tool; official GitHub topics include python, git, cli, repository-management, multirepo, and multiple-repositories.
